positions.title: Software Development Engineer, GenAI & Automation
positions.description: Built Python automation services for development, debugging, deployment checks, and release validation by packaging logs, configuration data, and run context into reusable engineering workflows. Developed agentic AI workflows using planner-executor patterns, tool registry design, MCP-style tool adapters, stateful context management, retry handling, and traceable execution logs.
achievements: Built Python automation services for development, debugging, deployment checks, and release validation workflows.
Developed AI-driven validation flows with structured prompts, tool-calling adapters, guardrails, retry handling, and execution traces.
Designed FastAPI REST endpoints and UI integrations to trigger regression runs and track execution status through an internal portal.
Integrated Jenkins CI/CD pipelines to auto-trigger builds and publish release certification reports.

positions.title: Software Engineer, AI Platform
positions.description: Built an LLM-powered incident-triage assistant for cloud operations, enabling structured RCA, query handling, troubleshooting support, and investigation workflows across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.
achievements: Developed Python-based intent routing and tool-selection logic for cloud operations workflows.
Built RAG pipeline components using embeddings, vector retrieval, and knowledge-base context.
Containerized AI workflow services with Docker and supported Kubernetes-based deployment cycles.

positions.title: Machine Learning Engineer Co-op
positions.description: Built ML-ready HR analytics datasets from years of HR/ERP data and developed forecasting workflows using machine learning and time-series models to improve workforce planning insights.
achievements: Engineered HR analytics datasets and standardized records for workforce planning models.
Developed attrition-risk, leave-usage, and turnover forecasting workflows using XGBoost, ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM.
Applied NLP and GenAI-assisted text analysis to employee feedback to extract retention insights.
Delivered dashboards in Power BI and QuickSight that reduced reporting time and refresh latency.

positions.title: Software Engineer, Full Stack
positions.description: Built a Python-based vehicle feature configuration service and developed REST APIs with rule-validation workflows to support self-service packaging processes.
achievements: Developed Python REST APIs with schema validation, exception handling, and centralized business-rule logic.
Implemented a rule-validation engine for feature dependencies and configuration constraints.
Created batch-processing jobs for data ingestion, reconciliation, and scheduled reporting.
Optimized data access and improved backend performance using SQL tuning, caching, and Docker packaging.
